text: I have no idea what is going on!
I have no idea what is going on!

I have no idea what is going on!
I have no idea what is going on!
I have no idea what is going on!
I have no idea what is going on!
I have no idea what is going on!
I have no idea what is going on!
Seize the sol, as they say!
Clustered comets!
So much to see, so little time!
What on Mars are you doing?
What on Mars are you doing?
What on Mars are you doing?
What on Mars are you doing?
What on Mars are you doing?
Scaredy cat? But... cats are the scariest creatures of all!
Ah! You have invaded my heart!
Beach day? That is too much water for me!
You do not scare me! At all!
Why peppermint?
I have seen grass from both sides, but I cannot tell which one is more green...
You can never have too many friends!
You mean a chicken fried this rice?
You mean a chicken fried this rice?
You mean a chicken fried this rice?
You mean a chicken fried this rice?
You mean a chicken fried this rice?
I reckon we're gonna tan their hides, pardner!
That is very unkind, you... whippersnapper! ...I do not know other equally insulting terms.
I tried the chicken nuggets you suggested. But... why are they shaped like dinosaurs?
Hm... perhaps I should prioritize "cat" on my list of languages to learn.
*sigh* ...I am incompatible with this activity.
*gasps* I would like to encounter a real horse!
Oh, moons! You are purple! Are you feeling unwell?
Do not panic! I will call a medic! Oh, but I am a medic! Uh, I will call another medic!
How am I supposed to sing if I do not know the words? AaAaAAAaaAaah...! Did I do that right?
I remember this place! This is where I learned not to drink soy sauce.
This city is always so noisy! Why was traffic even invented?
Martian? Always have been!
I am here to abduct you!
